primary.description: Deep sophisticated slate for authoritative trust (Primary Brand)

secondary.description: Vibrant academic blue for interactive states and highlights

accent.description: High-visibility orange for Primary CTAs ('Apply Now')

background.description: Pure white for maximum contrast and clean aesthetic

surface.description: Off-white for section backgrounds and cards

headings.strategy: High-impact, tracking-tight, bold. No generic sans-serifs.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[4rem] tracking-tight leading-none font-extrabold
scale.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix tall, wide, and square cards to create visual tension and artful asymmetry. For Dashboard, use Control Room grid.

hero_carousel.instructions: Full height (min-h-[80vh] or 90vh) relative container. Use AnimatePresence for smooth crossfade or slide between images every 5 seconds. Pause on hover. Absolute positioned text overlay with z-10.
hero_carousel.overlay: bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-900/80 via-slate-900/30 to-transparent to ensure perfect text readability.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(249,115,22,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(249,115,22,0.5)] hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md text-white border border-white/20 font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50

ai_chatbot.design: Floating bubble with pulse animation. Open state reveals a sleek chat interface with predefined quick-action buttons ('Fees?', 'Subjects?', 'Admission process?'). Use primary blue for the chat bubble.

animations.page_load: Staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) for text elements.
animations.scroll: Use framer-motion whileInView for sections to fade-up gracefully.
animations.micro: Buttons scale up slightly (scale 1.05) on hover. Images pan slowly (scale 1.05 over 10s) in the hero background (Ken Burns effect).

hero_slider_images.description: Happy students at desks in classroom

about_image.description: Students collaborating for About Us or Admission section

instructions_to_main_agent: Set up Cabinet Grotesk and Manrope in tailwind config.

Implement the Hero Auto-Slider: Create an array of the `hero_slider_images` provided. Use a setInterval (3000ms-5000ms) to change the active index. Use framer-motion AnimatePresence to crossfade images. On hover, clear the interval to pause. Overlay a dark gradient (`bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-900/80 via-slate-900/30 to-slate-900/10`) to ensure text pops.
The Hero text must include an 'Apply Now' primary button (Orange) and 'Ask AI' secondary button.
Build the AI Chatbot component as a floating button in the bottom right. When clicked, it should open a sleek chat window. Display Quick Action chips for 'Fees?', 'Subjects?', 'Admission process?'.
For the Admission Form: Create a clean, multi-step layout using Shadcn Form components with large touch-friendly inputs.
For the Admin Dashboard: Use the 'Control Room' grid (grid-cols-4) with tighter spacing. Use Shadcn components for tables and charts. No rounded-3xl here, keep it to rounded-lg for density.
For the AI Homework Helper: Create a dedicated page with a clean chat interface.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="hero-apply-btn"`).
Use generous padding `py-24` between sections on the homepage. Design a features/highlights section using the Tetris bento grid.
For cards on the homepage, strictly follow the border-radius `rounded-2xl` and hover animations (`-translate-y-2`, shadow increase).
Navigation bar must be sticky and use glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80`).
Avoid typical Bootstrap looks. Follow the E1 rules of generous negative space.
